description: Add control points to faces. Control points are added on all faces in the current building blocks set if < range > is not supplied.

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.description: Add control points to faces. Control points are added on all faces in the current building blocks set if <range> is not supplied.

keywords.name: adummy
keywords.description: Add exactly i X i control points (grid) per each face (i must be a positive integer 0,2,3,…,20). Added control points will be evenly spaced. Also will add i CPs per each internal edge from the list of the faces. If i = 0 control points are removed.

keywords.name: no-edges-cp
keywords.description: Optional. Skip adding-removing CPs to-from edges.
